description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gable roof and a large attached garage on one side. The front facade features a driveway, a car parked outside, and a covered porch with columns, while the rear of the house opens to a backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating, and landscaped greenery. The house exterior is clad in light-colored siding with contrasting dark roof shingles and multiple symmetrically arranged windows with shutters. The upper floor is partially open, revealing interior rooms and hallways, and the property is bordered by grass lawns and several trees. The backyard includes a paved area around the pool and a sun umbrella, creating a recreational space. The overall design is reminiscent of Colonial Revival architecture, blending traditional and modern suburban elements.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, attached garage, front porch, and a backyard featuring a swimming pool and patio. The exterior is light-colored with symmetrical windows and landscaped lawns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, front porch with columns, and a car parked outside.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a partial view of the backyard pool and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating, and large windows opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the garage, the pool area, and the transition between the driveway and backyard.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with columns, a single front door, and steps leading up from the driveway.
